```{r}
#| eval: false
#| echo: true
# Shared classification pipeline skeleton — edit this file only; include from slides/modules.

suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidymodels))

# --- Example data (replace with yours) --------------------------------------
iris_cls <- iris |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    y = factor(dplyr::if_else(Species == "virginica", "vir", "other"))
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(-Species)

# --- Recipe: preprocessing lives here (impute, encode, etc.) ----------------
rec <- recipe(y ~ ., data = iris_cls) |>
  step_zv(all_predictors()) |>
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())

# --- Model spec: swap engine for rand_forest, xgboost, mlp, etc. ------------
mod_spec <- decision_tree(
  tree_depth = tune(),
  min_n = tune()
) |>
  set_engine("rpart") |>
  set_mode("classification")

# --- Workflow ---------------------------------------------------------------
wf <- workflow() |>
  add_recipe(rec) |>
  add_model(mod_spec)

# --- Resampling & metrics ---------------------------------------------------
folds <- vfold_cv(iris_cls, v = 5)
metrics <- metric_set(roc_auc, accuracy, sens, spec)

tune_res <- tune_grid(
  wf,
  resamples = folds,
  grid = grid_regular(tree_depth(range = c(2, 6)), min_n(range = c(2, 20)), levels = 3),
  metrics = metrics
)

# --- Finalize & fit on full training data -----------------------------------
best <- select_best(tune_res, metric = "roc_auc")
final_wf <- finalize_workflow(wf, best)
final_fit <- fit(final_wf, data = iris_cls)

# --- Optional: last_fit with a held-out split for honest performance ---------
# data_split <- initial_split(iris_cls, prop = 0.8, strata = y)
# train <- training(data_split)
# test  <- testing(data_split)
# last_fit(final_wf, split = data_split)  # after finalize_workflow(...)
```

Edit only `teaching-hub/_includes/tidymodels-pipeline.qmd`; slide decks pull it in via Quarto `include`.
